items.title: $TSLA $MRVL $AVGO $MSFT $NVDA The fear was strong because the jobs report made the Fed look less likely to ease soon, and that is usually bearish for stocks in the short run. In other words, good economic news can become bad market news when it reduces the odds of rate cuts.

The company is targeting a valuation exceeding $1.75 trillion and has also secured a separate compute capacity deal with Anthro

items.body:
Reid Hoffman, who co-founded LinkedIn in 2002, is stepping down from Microsoft‘s (NASDAQ:MSFT) board of directors to refocus on Manus, his AI-powered drug discovery startup, the company announced Thursday.

items.title: Meta's stock sinks on report company could raise tens of billions of dollars to fund AI push
items.body: Meta shares dropped after the Financial Times reported the company could potentially raise tens of billions of dollars in a stock offering to help its AI push.

items.title: Warren Buffett disciple Guy Spier built career on value investing. A rare cancer changed everything
